title: Eurya monticola
taxonomy: Eurya monticola is a species of flowering plant in the family Pentaphylacaceae. It belongs to the genus Eurya and is native to certain regions. The classification of Eurya monticola is further divided into the kingdom Plantae and the phylum Magnoliophyta. At the order level, it falls under the Ericales. Further classification places it under the family Pentaphylacaceae, which is a family of flowering plants.
uses: Eurya monticola. The plant Eurya monticola has been traditionally used in various Asian cultures for its medicinal properties. It is believed to possess antimicrobial and antifungal properties, which can be beneficial in treating infections and wounds.
